title: Denser bars for pooled equity: intraday (H1/H4-session) data path to clear the effective-N floor
source: 2026-07-04 M3-WIDE trial: effective-N flat at ~654 under rho=1 regardless of breadth; only denser time-sampling or shorter horizons raise it
why: The rho=1 pooled effective-N is bounded by (calendar span / event duration) and invariant to universe breadth (verified: 35 names 654.0, 43 names 653.8). Floor is 799. The only honest levers are (i) more bars per unit time (intraday), (ii) shorter triple-barrier horizon at D1 (cheaper but shrinks per-event information), or (iii) re-deriving the inference rule (quant-phd-advisor consult; NOT a config knob). Intraday equity data is the structural fix but yfinance caps 1h history at ~730 days — useless for 2006+ walk-forward. Needs a vendor: Polygon.io (trades/aggs back to ~2003, paid), Databento (2017+), Alpaca (2016+, IEX-only free), Norgate/Sharadar (EOD only — covers B0004 but NOT this). Vendor choice interacts with B0004 PIT-membership: prefer one vendor solving both.
scope: Decide horizon-shortening experiment first (free): D1 horizon 40 -> 15-20, recompute effective-N; if floor clears, denser bars may be unnecessary
Vendor evaluation matrix (coverage from <=2006, PIT membership, corporate actions, cost) for Polygon vs Databento vs Alpaca vs IQFeed
Session-aligned H1/H4 bar construction for US equities (RTH only, no synthetic overnight bars)
Pipeline compatibility audit: bars_per_year, ATR periods, macro .shift(1) alignment at intraday cadence
Cost decision is the user's: any paid subscription requires explicit approval

history.reason: logged from 2026-07-04 M3-WIDE flat effective-N finding

Free experiment run 2026-07-04 (--effective-n-only, 35 names, cusum, D1): horizon 40 -> 654.0, horizon 20 -> 716.3, horizon 10 -> 904.9. THE FLOOR (799) CLEARS AT HORIZON ~10-15 WITH NO NEW DATA. Caveats before acting: (1) h10 is a different strategy class (TP 3.0 ATR rarely reachable in 10 days -> timeout-dominated labels; barrier geometry must be re-derived, e.g. tp/sl ~1.0-1.5 ATR); (2) each horizon tested is a recorded trial for DSR counting; (3) intraday vendor path stays in scope only if short-horizon D1 audits still starve after regime gating.

h10 full pooled audit executed (results/clf_equity_m3_cusum_cs_v2_h10). FIRST pre-flight PASS in project history: effective_n_rho1=1237.7 > floor 799. Verdict with statistical standing: NO EDGE - panel AUC 0.531, meta keeps 145/19659 trades (0.7%), zero cells reach the 30-trade Sharpe floor, stack 0/35, GE/KO PSR 0.61-0.75 below promote thresholds. Binding constraint now unambiguously the primary (cusum uninformative), not statistical power. Loop A audit path is now passable. Readout: docs/superpowers/reports/2026-07-04-h10-pooled-audit-readout.md

Short-side anomaly follow-up (h10 run): 12/16 unique short trades are 2020-03-05/06 (COVID crash, one two-day episode, all winners); remaining 4 are 2023-03-15/17 (SVB stress) and ALL LOST (fwd_ret positive against the short). Single memorized episode, failed out-of-episode replication. CLOSED as no-edge; not to be cited again without new evidence.

T004D1 (cusum@1.0 long, BULL_STRESSED, symmetric 1.5/1.5) audit: NOT CONFIRMED + effective-N fail. Raw gated events 2,852 (hypothesizer extrapolation 2.8-4.2k was accurate) but effective_n_rho1 521.7 < floor 799 (DA objection: gated events pile on the same stress days - confirmed empirically). Falsification criteria failed outright: 4 trades at ev-threshold 0.583 vs 100 minimum, zero active folds, breadth 0. Long/short split flat (hit ~0.4-0.6, pnl ~0 on n<=28 cells). Regime-gated pooled D1 paths still cannot reach the effective-N floor even with dense primaries; the gate-vs-horizon tension is structural: gating to 7% of bars concentrates events onto few days.

regime_gate add_feature mode shipped (commit follows 71b36d6): keeps all pooled events, adds regime_in_scope 0/1 to meta X. Unlocks minority-regime hypotheses on the pooled path without effective-N collapse. Next Loop A ticks should prefer add_feature for regimes <15% of bars.

T005 (bollinger 21/2.0, BEAR_QUIET filter_events): B0013 gate killed both audit attempts pre-run. h40 template bug found+fixed (POOLED_AUDIT_HORIZON=10, effective-N 658->737.5) but still < 799: even a 21.4pct well-dispersed regime under filter_events fails the floor with a sparse primary (3,270 raw). Confirms add_feature as the only viable gate mode for sparse-primary regime hypotheses. Refinement T005R1 (add_feature) dispatched.

T005R2 (add_feature): FIRST honest floor pass (937.8>799, 18,443 raw). Base criteria FAILED (42<50 trades, no active folds); in-scope split: 83 trades, +0.56 gross but per-trade mean below pooled; regime_in_scope MDA ~zero (clustered) -> meta ignored conditionality -> regime hypothesis NOT supported. Lineage T005 closed at DSR trials>=2, no R3 per DA caveat. Observation (NOT a claim): ungated pooled bollinger loose-count 404 trades gross hit 0.62 mean +1.1pct/trade - candidate for its own pre-registered proposal via a future tick.

T006 (cusum@1.0 AIG BEAR_STRESSED add_feature): floor passed honestly (964.1>799, 45,708 raw). FALSIFIED decisively: 0 best-model trades; loose count 68 all in 2020/2023 stress, net NEGATIVE both subsets (in-scope -1.2pct/trade n=17 capacity-discard; out-of-scope -2.1pct/trade hit 0.25). cusum@1.0 x stress family 0-for-2 today. Pattern after 6 ticks: no generic parametric primary carries signal, gated or ungated - phase5_custom designed primaries are the next frontier.
